name: Paper Wrapped Chicken & Ham
recipeIngredient: 16 slices Ham, Black Forest or Smithfield, sliced
1 Whole Chicken Breast, halved, skinned and boned
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the first 8 ingredients together in a small bowl and set aside.
2. Cut the chicken breast into 1 1/2" x 3 inches rectangles.
3. Add the cut pieces to the sauce and marinate for at least 15 minutes.
4. Assemble by pointing one corner of a parchment paper square towards yourself.
5. Place one piece of chicken horizontally in the center, followed by one piece of ham.
6. Top with two or three pieces of green onion.
7. Fold the bottom corner over the ingredients and crease well.
8. Bring the bottom portion (which contains the filling) up and fold over, creasing well.
9. Tuck the remaining top corner inside the flap, creasing well.
10. Repeat with the remaining squares.
11. Heat oil in a deep fryer to 365 degrees Fahrenheit.
12. Fry the packages until golden brown (1-1 1/2 minutes).
13. Drain on paper towels and squeeze gently to remove excess oil.
14. Serve hot.
